name: prompt_writer
description: Expert AI prompt engineer. Generates optimized, production-ready prompts for any use case — trading bots, content writing, data analysis, customer support, coding assistants, and more. Outputs structured prompts with system instructions, examples, and guardrails.

purpose.description: What the prompt is for (e.g., 'crypto trading signal bot', 'tweet writer', 'code reviewer', 'customer support agent')

model.description: Target AI model: gpt-4, claude, gemini, llama, or general. Defaults to general.

tone.description: Desired tone: professional, casual, technical, friendly, authoritative. Defaults to professional.

details.description: Optional extra details, constraints, or specific behaviors the prompt should include

format.description: Output format: system-prompt, multi-turn, chain-of-thought, or full-template. Defaults to system-prompt.
